programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A small fire incident leaves Mamoru's apartment in a total mess, forcing him to stay at Rei's place for the time being.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa bumps into a young man after becoming enthralled in a beautiful illustration book she had Usagi buy for her.
programme.sub-title: Forest of Illusion: A Beautiful Fairy's Invitation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami is shocked when she sees Mamoru coming out of his apartment with another woman.
programme.sub-title: Drive to the Heavens: The Dream Car Fueled with Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa befriends Miharu, who is aiming to be the best swordwoman in Japan.
programme.sub-title: Aiming for the Top: The Pretty Swordswoman's Dilemma

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Yoshiki Usui’s new store opens. Usagi and her friends head out to see the fashion show, along with Fish’s Eye, who is captivated by Usui's good looks.
programme.sub-title: We Love Fashion: The Stylish Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi spots Minako out on a date with a handsome man. To everyone's surprise, the boyfriend is different from the one Usagi saw earlier.
programme.sub-title: Storm of Love: Minako's Grand Two-Timing Plan

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: An old woman named Mayako lives alone in a mansion. Mayako is very distrustful of strangers, believing they are after her wealth and fortune.
programme.sub-title: The Secret Mansion: A Menu of Love for You

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Reports of Pegasus attacking the town cause Usagi and the other Sailor Guardians to have doubts about whether Pegasus can be trusted or not.
programme.sub-title: Believe in Pegasus: The Four Guardians' Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends are enjoying their summer vacation by the beach. Shingo is acting as their bodyguard—especially for Ami, whom he has a crush on.
programme.sub-title: Shining Summer Days: Ami Under the Sea-Breeze

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa see an ad for a free ballet lesson and sign up. As they practice, Fish’s Eye draws the class's attention with his dancing skills.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa meet a woman named Rubina who follows them. Rubina is a princess who snuck out to experience life outside of her royal duties.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls attend the school festival. Makoto is asked to dance by a handsome man, who is actually Tiger's Eye in disguise.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Fish's Eye goes after Mamoru. But Mamoru seems to show no interest in being with anyone besides Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of Evil: The Trio's Last Chance

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Zirconia threatens the Amazon Trio that if they don’t capture Pegasus by the next new moon, the magic making them human will wear off.
programme.sub-title: Mirrors of Dreams: The Amazon's Last Stage

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.
programme.sub-title: The Amazoness: Nightmare from Behind the Mirrors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami falls in love with a melody she finds online. She works on lyrics that match the melody and also goes to meet the composer, Toshiyuki Nishino.
programme.sub-title: True Power Explodes: Ami's Melody of the Heart

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei becomes famous after posing for a magazine. A girl named Nanako, expresses her desire to study under Rei so that she can become just like her.
programme.sub-title: Flames of Passion: Mars's Raging Super Attack

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa go to the dentist to get their cavities treated. The dental clinic is actually a trap set up by Palla-Palla to find Pegasus.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto compete to win the heart of Honjo, a young principal. But their rivalry starts to put a strain on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Clash of Dreams: Minako and Makoto's Broken Friendship

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.
programme.sub-title: Overcome Your Fear: The Jump to Freedom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.
programme.sub-title: Pegasus's Secret: The Boy Who Protects the Dream World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia demands that Helios give up the Golden Crystal in exchange for Sailor Chibi Moon. The Sailor Guardians are struggling to defeat Zirconia.
programme.sub-title: The Golden Crystal Appears: Nehalennia's Magic

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia regains her full power and proceeds to put the world into an eternal slumber.Sailor Moon tries to activate the power of the Golden Crystal.
programme.sub-title: When the Crystal Shines: The Beautiful Power of Dreams

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Golden Crystal’s power defeats Nehelenia, pushing her back into the abyss. Nehelenia tries to take Sailor Chibi Moon with her.
programme.sub-title: Dreams Forever: Fill the Heavens with Light

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends start their new lives as high school girls. Nehalennia breaks out of her prison to seek revenge against the Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: The Flower of Nightmares Scatters: The Queen of Darkness Returns

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.
programme.sub-title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: During World War II's Battle of Okinawa, U.S. Army medic Desmond Doss (Andrew Garfield) braves bullets, grenades and snipers while single-handedly evacuating the wounded from behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Hours, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A new father (Paul Walker) must remain behind and try to keep his prematurely born daughter alive after Hurricane Katrina knocks out the power in their New Orleans hospital.

programme.title: Stronger, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Jeff Bauman loses both of his legs when two bombs explode during the Boston Marathon on April 15, 2013. With unwavering support from his family and girlfriend, Bauman embarks on a long and heroic journey to physical and emotional rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Impossible, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A couple and their three sons encounter terror, courage and compassion following the December 2004 tsunami that devastated Thailand.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married?, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Revelations of infidelity and other secrets force eight married friends to take a hard look at issues of commitment, betrayal and forgiveness.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: While on vacation in the Bahamas, the unexpected arrival of one's ex-husband causes some longtime friends to examine the strength of their own marriages.

programme.title: The Single Moms Club, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Brought together by their children's potential expulsion from school, diverse single mothers (Nia Long, Amy Smart, Cocoa Brown) form a support group to help one another overcome life's challenges.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Tom is a young man who believes it's better to be a fake somebody than a real nobody. Finally, A wealthy American shipbuilder hires Tom to travel to Italy to bring back his playboy son.

programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: Downsizing, (2017, Dramedy)
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, Paul and his wife decide to get small and live large in a luxurious downsized community. With endless possibilities in the tiny world, Paul realizes we are meant for something bigger.

programme.title: Heathers, (1988, Comedy)
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: Heartbreakers, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother/daughter con team. Max targets wealthy men and marries them. Page then seduces them while Max "catches" her wayward husbands in the act. Then on to the next mark, posing in a variety of guises to keep one step ahead of the law.

programme.title: 48 Hrs., (1982, Action)
programme.desc: Nolte is a rough-edged cop after two vicious cop-killers. He can't do it without the help of smooth Murphy, who is serving time for a half-million dollar robbery.

programme.title: Another 48 Hrs., (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Times may change…but these guys don’t! Eddie Murphy and Nick Nolte are back on the streets in this smash sequel.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop, (1984, Comedy)
programme.desc: The heat is on in this fast-paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friend's killer in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: The squad mates go to their childhood home, the Garden, for testing, and encounter Zero Two's former teammates; an intense battle with Klaxosaurs exposes Zero Two's lust for combat, giving Hiro cause for concern.
programme.sub-title: The Garden Where It All Began

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: Zero Two remembers being experimented upon and tortured by Garden scientists as a young child, while Hiro remembers his time in the Garden, a forgotten promise, and his attempt to free Zero Two from captivity.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: The squad keeps Zero Two away from Hiro as he recovers from the recent battle; the Parasites learn about a major operation using multiple squads, including the Nines; a distraught Zero Two faces the prospect of leaving Hiro to rejoin her old squad.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: The squads deploy to attack Grand Crevasse head-on; Hiro watches helplessly from the sidelines as Zero Two fights with her mental state on the verge of collapse; a massive Klaxosaur reveals itself and threatens to crash into Plantation 13.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: Squad 13 must remain in Plantation 13 by themselves and adapt to their relative isolation.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: Zero Two's old squad pays a visit to Squad 13, but their arrival complicates a shocking development with Kokoro; representatives for humanity approach the Klaxosaur leader to demand their surrender.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx
programme.desc: As Squad 13 prepares to leave their decaying home forever, they throw a wedding for Mitsuru and Kokoro, but an element within the organization disapproves of the couple's romance.

programme.title: Darling in the Franxx

programme.title: O Suspeito da Rua Arlington, (1999)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jean Reno, Ryôko Hirosue, Michel Muller Diretor: Gérard Krawczyk

Quando um cantor de música country (Toby Keith) é forçado a encarar seu passado após a morte do irmão, ele retorna para casa e encontra sua namorada dos tempos do colégio (Kelly Preston) e uma filha de 16 anos (Lindsey Haun) que ele nunca conheceu. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Toby Keith, Kelly Preston, Lindsey Haun, Willie Nelson, Burt Reynolds, Tess Harper, Anna Maria Horsford, Katie Finneran, Josh Henderson, Daniel Newman Diretor: Steven Goldmann

programme.title: Oliver Twist, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. Uma adaptação do clássico conto de Dickens, em que um órfão encontra um batedor de carteiras nas ruas de Londres. De lá, ele se junta a uma família de meninos que são treinados para roubar para seu mestre. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Barney Clark, Jeremy Swift, Ian McNeice, Ben Kingsley, Richard Durden Diretor: Roman Polanski

programme.title: A Prova, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. The daughter of a brilliant but mentally disturbed mathematician, recently deceased, tries to come to grips with her possible inheritance: his insanity. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Gwyneth Paltrow, Anthony Hopkins, Jake Gyllenhaal, Hope Davis, Tobiasz Daszkiewicz, Danny McCarthy Diretor: John Madden

programme.title: A Qualquer Preço, (1998)
programme.desc: 1998. O advogado especialista em danos pessoais Jan só aceita grandes casos que sejam resolvidos com segurança fora do tribunal. Embora o caso mais recente pareça simples, ele se envolve em uma batalha épica, na qual está disposto arristar sua carreira. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: John Travolta, Robert Duvall, James Gandolfini, Dan Hedaya, John Lithgow, William H. Macy, Kathleen Quinlan, Tony Shalhoub, Zeljko Ivanek, Mary Mara Diretor: Steven Zaillian

programme.title: Promessas de Guerra, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Joshua Connor perdeu seus três filhos na batalha de Galípoli, em 1919. Ele recebe então a ajuda de Ayshe, uma mulher que está à espera do marido, enviado para a guerra, e de seu filho, o pequeno Orhan. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Russell Crowe, Olga Kurylenko, Jai Courtney Diretor: Russell Crowe

programme.title: Perfume - A História de Um Assassino, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, nascido com um sentido olfativo superior, cria o melhor perfume do mundo. Seu trabalho, no entanto, toma um rumo sombrio enquanto ele procura o perfume definitivo. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Ben Whisaw, Dustin Hoffman, Alan Rickman Diretor: Tom Twyker

programme.title: A Menina Invisível, (2019)

Lichtenberg, Anna Shirin Habedank, Lui Eckhardt, Victoria Mayer, Luc Schiltz, Jeanne Werner... Diretor: Markus Dietrich

programme.title: Um Acampamento do Barulho, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Em seus jogos de acampamento de verão, Spence e seu irmão mais velho Zach se encontram em times opostos: são os idiotas contra os valentões. Spence pode fazer novos amigos, superar seus medos, enfrentar os valentões e ganhar um troféu no processo? programme.desc: 1970. Deacon viaja às Filipinas com o objetivo de doar um rim para sua sobrinha doente. Depois de uma noite de romance, ele descobre que uma mulher o enganou e roubou seu rim. Deacon começa uma violenta corrida contra o tempo para recuperar o órgão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Duelo Final, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rebecca achou que finalmente havia se livrado do mundo secreto do combate ilegal. Agora, com sua irmã em perigo, ela deve relutantemente retornar à vida que abandonou para salvar sua família e confrontar o líder enlouquecido do clube de luta. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um caso de identidade trocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra entre dois rivais de Nova York: Rabino e Chefe, os senhores do crime. Sob o olhar atento de um detetive e do assassino Goodkat, Slevin precisa elaborar um plano para salvar a sua pele. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Aventura e Tanto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cão vira-lata Pluto aparece de repente e muda a vida da família Davis, que está enfrentando tempos difíceis. Em pouco tempo, ele salva uma criança, traz conforto a um garoto doente e repara um relacionamento desgastado de pai e filho. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Max Steel, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Max é um adolescente de 16 anos que está passando por um período de descobertas. Entretanto, as transformações na vida do jovem estão relacionadas aos incríveis poderes que ele descobre ter quando entra em contato com uma força extraterrestre. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Segurança Nacional, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Incomodados pela criação da lei que permite a derrubada de aviões no espaço aéreo nacional, traficantes planejam ataques terroristas contra o Sistema de Vigilância da Amazônia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Ruas em Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um veterano de guerra tenta ajudar um garoto e seu irmão mais novo quando eles se envolvem com um viciado em drogas e sua gangue. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Rastros do Além, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de um evento cataclísmico o mundo passa a viver uma nova realidade onde os vivos e os mortos coexistem. Após nove anos de convivência pacífica, uma jovem é ameaçada e se arrisca para descobrir o por quê desta mudança repentina. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Última Peça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paula organiza uma festa surpresa para seu irmão e, quando está prestes a terminar de decorar a casa com muitos dinossauros, descobre que um dos brinquedos veio faltando uma peça. Para recuperá-la, ela tem que enfrentar o malvado dono da loja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sempre de Olho - Uma História Marble Hornet, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma equipe de jornalistas de uma cidade pequena encontra uma caixa com algumas fitas de vídeo. Ao assistirem aos filmes, eles se deparam com uma figura sem rosto torturando uma família. E logo descobrem que a criatura também os está seguindo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Folaké descobre o cadáver do seu pai e as suas suspeitas recaem sobre Bola; Bola quer enviar os restos mortais do seu pai para Lagos; os últimos desejos do Chefe Abayomi são revelados. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bola quer unir o Conselho à sua causa e ameaça Jacob se ele ficar em Lagos; os associados de Jacob estão nervosos por Abayomi estar morto; o tribunal aceita o pedido de Bola e cancela o testamento; Folaké descobre a duplicidade de Prospero. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob visita Folaké e descobre a traição de seu amigo; Bola diz a Prospero que pode influenciar o setor energético; Lerato está no hospital e corre o risco de sofrer um aborto espontâneo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob e Folake têm um filho e ela anuncia a Jacob que vai a Lagos para apanhar seu irmão; Bola é preso pelo assassinato de seu pai; o testamento é reconhecido: Jacob se torna Chefe iorubá; graças às suas ligações, Bola sai da prisão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob, um brilhante homem de negócios, está prestes a obter um grande contrato governamental da área de energia. Seu chefe revela a ele que é seu pai biológico e Jacob promete realizar o sonho do homem: construir um império e manter a família unida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimmy captura seu irmão Billy e o leva ao Mestre das Sombras, mas o vilão se volta contra ele. Para escapar, os irmãos se transformam e enfrenam o Mestre. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob confessa a sua infidelidade a Lerato e parte; Prospero tenta subornar Glenda e oferece o seu trabalho em troca de informações; Jacob apoia o seu irmão e investe na empresa de segurança que acaba de criar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Guardiões, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um guarda-costas é encarregado de proteger a filha de um importante cientista, para que a pesquisa de sua empresa não caia em mãos erradas. Quando um grupo de mercenários surge para roubar o material, será preciso lutar para sobreviver. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Condução Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Simon Keller, um misterioso ladrão, planeja roubar um banco e obriga um antigo piloto de corrida a dirigir o carro de fuga. Após o roubo, eles enfrentam policiais e mafiosos em uma alucinante perseguição na costa da Austrália. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Passagem para a Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso misterioso chega em uma pequena cidade planejando roubar o banco local, presumindo que tudo vai correr bem. Mas quando ele encontra um professor aposentado de poesia, seus planos tomam uma rumo improvável. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Vigilante Mascarado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Lutador profissional abandona a vida de violência e se torna pastor em uma pequena cidade. Entretanto, a criminalidade do local o obriga a retomar os velhos hábitos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Outra Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma cientista desenvolve uma droga revolucionária que induz realidades virtuais e expande a sensação de tempo. O governo tenta assumir projeto, e agora ela precisa decidir como usar sua poderosa criação. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Laços de um Crime, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma família de policiais sofre um verdadeiro colapso moral. Isso porque dois irmãos, sufocados pela sombra do pai, o ex-chefe de polícia, precisam investigar um crime que eles próprios cometeram. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: 438 Dias, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Os jornalistas suecos Martin Schibbye e Johan Persson cruzam ilegalmente a fronteira da Somália com a Etiópia para relatar como a busca implacável por petróleo afetou a população da região de Ogaden, isolada e cheia de conflitos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Outra Face da Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após perder a mãe e a casa para as tropas invasoras alemãs, Artur encontra certo consolo em se juntar ao exército. No entanto, a guerra não é nada como ele imaginou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sobibor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O oficial soviético Alexander Pechersky organiza uma revolta e uma fuga em massa dos prisioneiros de Sobibor, um campo de extermínio, em outubro de 1943. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tráfico de Mulheres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Três jovens mulheres, da América, da Nigéria e da Índia, são vítimas do tráfico de mulheres, sendo escravizadas para a prática de prostituição. O lucro pode ser de centenas de bilhões de dólares anualmente, superando o das maiores empresas do mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Wim de A a Z, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Conheça a história do órfão Wim, um menino que quer muito ir à escola em vez de passar o tempo todo trabalhando forçadamente na fábrica da cidade. Com muita força de vontade, Wim consegue escapar e encontrar novos amigos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Carlitos e o Policial, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após sair da prisão, Carlitos é chamado para participar em um roubo. No meio do assalto, Edna, a dona da casa que está sendo roubada, fica tão encantada pelo charme de Carlitos que o absolve diante da polícia. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Alex Rider Contra o Tempo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Rider, adolescente britânico habilidoso em linguística, mergulho, artes marciais e tiro, é recrutado pelo MI6. Sua primeira missão é investigar o bilionário Darrius Sayle, que fez suspeitas doações de megacomputadores às escolas da Inglaterra. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Paixão em Seoul, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Kim é uma jovem filipina que vive com seus pais superprotetores. Quando descobre uma vaga para ensinar inglês a um empresário em Seul, ela foge para uma vida nova. Ela só não espera viver um triângulo amoroso com seu aluno e o assistente dele. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Kazekage Se Mantém No Alto - T01E05
programme.desc: 2007. Naruto e sakura derrotam kakashi no desafio de sobrevivência. Tsunade os nomeia como uma equipe de três liderados por kakashi, e diz que agora eles são todos iguais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Missão Cumprida - T01E06
programme.desc: 2007. Para proteger sua aldeia da argila explosiva de deidara, gaara usa seu chakra para criar um escudo de areia gigante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Corra Kankuro - T01E07
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara, totalmente sem forças, é arrastado paralonge por deidara. Kankuro ignora esforços de baki de parar deidara e sai imediatamente em perseguição com um pelotão para salvar gaara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Kakashi Se Mobiliza - T01E08
programme.desc: 2007. A caminho da aldeia da areia, temari encontra kakashi e sua equipe. Kakashi chama naruto quando ele tenta seguir adiante e naruto explode sua raiva pelos akatsuki. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lagrimas Do Jinchuriki - T01E09
programme.desc: 2007. Uma mensagem urgente da aldeia da areia informando o sequestro do kazekage pelos akatsuki chega à aldeia da folha. Tsunade não perde tempo em mandar a equipe kakashi para a aldeia da areia. Enquanto isso, kankuro começa a sua batalha contra os akatsuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas! - T01E10
programme.sub-title: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas!
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas da areia lutam contra o tempo para salvar kankuro,até queumaperitaem veneno da areia, vovó chiyo é chamada.a única esperança está nos reforços enviados por tsunade. Mas naruto, sakura e kakashi são atrasados por uma tempestade de areia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Aprendiz De Médica Ninja - T01E11
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata kankuro que está gravemente enfermo. Após um extenso treinamento, Sakura se tornou um incrível médica ninja e deixa todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Determinação Da Vovó Aposentada - T01E12
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos akatsuki. A equipe kakashi e temari se preparam para resgatar, mas temari recebe ordens para ficar e ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó chiyo se oferece para tomar o lugar de temari. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Encontro Com Destino - T01E13
programme.desc: 2007. A equipe kakashi encontra itachi uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Kakashi diz a todos para não olharem nos olhos sharingan de itachi. Kakashi se prepara para enfrentar itachi sozinho e pede que naruto dê cobertura. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Crescimento De Naruto - T01E14
programme.desc: 2007. Guy lamenta sua asneira ao ver seus três alunos presos pela prisão de água.determinado a parar kisame, guy o desafia usando o nunchaku, sua arma favorita. É um super taijutsu contra uma super força humana. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Esfera Secreta De Chama… - T01E15
programme.desc: 2007. Vovó chiyo e sakura salvam naruto do genjutsu de itachi.no mesmo instante, kakashi começa um contra-ataque. Uma batalha ninja de nível alto começa e kakashi exibe toda sua destreza e perício usando uma tática sutil. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Do Jinchurik! - T01E16
programme.desc: 2007. Seus inimigos derrotados, kisame e itachi, parecem ter sido clones, cujos poderes e aparecimento foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Morte Do Gaara - T01E17
programme.desc: 2007. As equipes kakashi e guy fazem uma pausa.vovó chiyo observa naruto cochilar e lembra de sasori quando criança. programme.title: 2008. Embora Mikami tenha escrito os nomes de todos no Death Note, estavam vivos. Near consegue o Death Note e tudo é revelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E37

programme.title: 2007. O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E01

programme.title: 2007. Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.title: 2007. Ryuk o Shinigami que deixou cair o Death Note no mundo humano, avisa a Light que alguém está no seu encalço. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.title: 2007. Light usa o Death Note para tentar se livrar de uma mulher que poderia ter levado para a prisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.title: 2007. L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.title: 2007. Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.title: 2007. As suspeitas de L estão cada vez maior, e Light o convence a convidá-lo para a investigação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E10

programme.title: 2007. Como previsto nas fitas enviadas a TV Sakura, apresentadores e comentaristas de notícias expressaram suas dúvidas sobre a morte de Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E11

programme.title: 2008. Com um segundo Kira solto, L pede Light para se unir ao grupo especial para descobrir o paradeiro do verdadeiro Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E12

programme.title: 2008. Light viaja a Aoyama para descobrir a identidade do segundo Kira antes que L suspeite mais ainda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E13

programme.title: 2008. Light e Misa mostram seus Death Notes, então Light pede que Misa use sua Rem Shinigami para se livrar de L. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E14

programme.title: 2008. Há evidências que apontam para Misa Amane como o segundo Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E15

programme.title: 2008. Misa está presa, embora suas lembranças do Death Note tenham sido excluídas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E16

programme.title: 2008. Após 50 dias presos os assassinatos continuam, Misa e Light são soltos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E17

programme.title: 2008. Apesar de L ainda ser suspeito, Light e Misa (suas memórias de terem sido Kira foram apagadas) voltam ao quartel. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E18

programme.title: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: 2003. A etapa egípcia do Campeonato do Mundo culmina com a partida final, destacando a Dinastia F contra a Revolução BBA. programme.desc: An inept dog groomer (Jeff Daniels) and a limousine driver (Jim Carrey) chase the latters dream girl (Lauren Holly) cross-country. Starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two lazy, immature men become rivals when the marriage of ones mother and the others father forces them to live as siblings in the same house. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Jacob comes to a heartbreaking realization, while Mias past finally catches up to her, leading to tumultuous events for everyone.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Relationships are imploding, and the fallout seems to have deadly consequences; Leo is in a race against time to try and uncover who is really behind the deaths at the hospital, while Alan is forced to take drastic actions to protect Mia.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance. Starring Gary Oldman, Armie Hammer, Evangeline Lilly.

programme.title: Owning Mahowny
programme.desc: A casino manager preys on a compulsive gambler (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who had kept his obsession a secret from his girlfriend (Minnie Driver). Starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Minnie Driver, Maury Chaykin.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she cant figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will is having trouble recovering after his experience with Kali, but the team soon finds that insomnia is the least of his problems; Helen discovers an unbelievable gift from an equally unbelievable source.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team goes on a routine mission to retrieve an Abnormal and take it to safety; the mission becomes anything but routine when they are forced to stage a bank heist in order to protect the public from harm.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street
programme.desc: A retail-war lawyer (Dylan McDermott) goes to court to prove a department-store Santa Claus (Richard Attenborough) is for real. Starring Richard Attenborough, Elizabeth Perkins, Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power. Starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard.

programme.title: Charlies Angels
programme.desc: Three private detectives try to rescue a kidnapped computer pro whose voice-ID software would threaten global security. Starring Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore, Lucy Liu.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged newswoman (Meg Ryan) becomes obsessed with meeting a grieving widower (Tom Hanks) she heard on a late-night radio call-in show. Starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Bill Pullman.

programme.title: What a Girl Wants
programme.desc: A vivacious teenager (Amanda Bynes) leaves New York in order to meet her estranged father (Colin Firth) in London. Starring Amanda Bynes, Colin Firth, Kelly Preston.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Driven by an intense need for fame and validation, members of a dysfunctional Hollywood dynasty have lives as dramatic as any movie. Starring Julianne Moore, Mia Wasikowska, John Cusack.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter (Alison Lohman) probes the reasons behind the sudden split of a 1950s comedy team (Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth). Starring Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth, Alison Lohman.

programme.title: Fugitive Pieces
programme.desc: A writer (Stephen Dillane) has trouble moving past his haunting memories of the Holocaust. Starring Stephen Dillane, Rade Serbedzija, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla resurfaces, sending Helen an SOS from deep within the Colombian Highlands; Will doesnt believe he can be trusted, and he may be right.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Kate are hijacked by armed thugs while transporting Abnormals. But before the gunmen get what they want, an old Abnormal friend, seeking safe harbor, attaches itself to Kate, endowing her with super powers.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: A silent-film star (Gene Kelly) loves a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds) who dubs his squeaky-voiced co-star in a 1927 Hollywood talkie. Starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor.

programme.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy and Rarity embark on an epic journey to save Ponyville from a dark force. Starring Emily Blunt, Kristin Chenoweth, Liev Schreiber.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: When hard times hit the town of Swallow Falls, a failed inventor constructs a device that turns water into delicious food. Starring Bill Hader, Anna Faris, James Caan.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures. Starring Bill Hader, Anna Faris, James Caan.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Jor-El of Krypton sends his baby to Earth, where he grows up as Clark Kent and works at the Daily Planet. Starring Christopher Reeve, Gene Hackman, Marlon Brando.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing. Starring Logan Lerman, Emma Watson, Ezra Miller.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: A Thousand and One
programme.desc: Unapologetic and free-spirited Inez kidnaps her 6-year-old son, Terry, from the foster care system. They set out to reclaim their sense of home, identity and stability in a rapidly changing New York City. Starring Teyana Taylor, Aaron Kingsley Adetola, Aven Courtney.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life. Starring Sarah Gadon, Peter Mooney, Alejandro Alvarez Cadilla.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: After losing a rigged sled race, Frankie challenges newcomer Zac to one last showdown. With the stakes higher than ever, Zac will stop at nothing to win the race. Starring Lucinda Davis, Noel Fisher, Angela Galuppo.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. A battle of wills soon breaks out as McGregor hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent. Starring James Corden, Fayssal Bazzi, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his makeshift family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be. Starring James Corden, Rose Byrne, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An image consultant transforms a tomboyish FBI agent into a beauty queen so she can work undercover to catch a terrorist. Starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt.

programme.desc: An idle rich womans (Shelley Long) husband (Craig T. Nelson) challenges her to lead their daughters troop of campers. Starring Shelley Long, Craig T. Nelson, Betty Thomas.

programme.desc: Four teens embark on the adventure of a lifetime when a video game magically transports them to the jungle and transforms them into adults. Starring Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Jack Black.

programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their familys home. Starring Corey Fogelmanis, Miles Gutierrez-Riley, Lena Dunham.

programme.desc: An English charmer (Hugh Grant) and a lusty American (Andie MacDowell) make love over a course of surprising events. Starring Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.desc: A peculiar neighbor (Suzanne Clement) offers hope to a recent widow (Anne Dorval) who is struggling to raise a teenager (Antoine-Olivier Pilon) who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent. Starring Anne Dorval, Antoine Olivier Pilon, Suzanne Clement.

programme.desc: An Illinois widow (Barbara Stanwyck) with two young sons meets a major (George Brent) on leave who wants to have an affair. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Warner Anderson.

programme.desc: A singers (Lee Bowman) ex-agent (Jack Carson) turns a wholesome girl (Doris Day) into a radio star. Starring Jack Carson, Doris Day, Lee Bowman.

programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat (Ray Bolger) escorts a chorus girl (Doris Day) mistakenly invited to Paris on behalf of American theater. Starring Doris Day, Ray Bolger, Claude Dauphin.

programme.title: Action in Arabia
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (George Sanders) and a French agent (Virginia Bruce) thwart a Nazi payoff to Arab sheiks in 1941 Damascus. Starring George Sanders, Virginia Bruce, Lenore Aubert.

programme.title: Background to Danger
programme.desc: A U.S. spy (George Raft) goes by train to Turkey and joins Russian agents against a Nazi spy (Sydney Greenstreet). Starring George Raft, Brenda Marshall, Sydney Greenstreet.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: A Dutch intelligence officer (Clark Gable) trains a shady woman (Lana Turner) for the underground, then thinks shes a Nazi spy. Starring Clark Gable, Lana Turner, Victor Mature.

programme.title: Above Suspicion
programme.desc: Honeymooners (Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray) spy for the British in 1939 Germany to learn more about the Nazis new magnetic mine. Starring Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray, Conrad Veidt.

programme.title: Assignment in Brittany
programme.desc: A French captain (Pierre Aumont) poses as a Nazi leader to pinpoint a U-boat base off the coast. Starring Jean-Pierre Aumont, Susan Peters, Richard Whorf.

programme.title: Sabotage Agent
programme.desc: A British spy (Robert Donat) helps the Czech underground blow up a Nazi poison-gas factory in Prague. Starring Robert Donat, Valerie Hobson, Walter Rilla.

programme.title: Hotel Berlin
programme.desc: An escapee (Helmut Dantine) from Dachau, an actress (Andrea King) and others hide in a grand hotel as the Third Reich falls. Starring Helmut Dantine, Andrea King, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugss home falls in the middle of an oil field that is owned by a stubborn business tycoon. This triggers a hilarious tug of war over the property rights to the space.

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: A cattleman (Rock Hudson) and his spoiled wife (Elizabeth Taylor) watch an upstart oilman (James Dean) try to take over Texas. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Rock Hudson, James Dean.

programme.title: The Last Picture Show
programme.desc: The lives of high schoolers (Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges), a debutante (Cybill Shepherd) and others overlap in a dying 1950s Texas town. Starring Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges, Cybill Shepherd.

programme.title: Dancer, Texas Pop. 81
programme.desc: Four teens rile residents of a tiny town off Highway 91 with their decision to relocate in Los Angeles. Starring Breckin Meyer, Peter Facinelli, Eddie Mills.

programme.title: Brewster McCloud
programme.desc: A birdlike boy (Bud Cort) lives in the Houston Astrodome, advised by his guardian angel (Sally Kellerman). Starring Bud Cort, Sally Kellerman, Michael Murphy.

programme.title: Seven Days in May
programme.desc: An aide (Kirk Douglas) discovers his generals (Burt Lancaster) Pentagon plot and tells the president (Fredric March). Starring Burt Lancaster, Kirk Douglas, Fredric March.

programme.title: Lucky Me
programme.desc: A songwriter (Robert Cummings) finds a singer (Doris Day) and her stranded troupe working in a Miami hotels kitchen. Starring Doris Day, Bob Cummings, Phil Silvers.

programme.title: The Helen Morgan Story
programme.desc: A hoodlum (Paul Newman), a lawyer (Richard Carlson) and alcoholism affect the 1920s torch singers (Ann Blyth) career. Starring Ann Blyth, Paul Newman, Richard Carlson.

programme.title: Helen of Troy
programme.desc: Menelaus and Agamemnon lead their Greek hordes against peaceful Troy to recapture the kidnapped queen (Rossana Podesta). Starring Rossana Podesta, Jack Sernas, Cedric Hardwicke.

programme.title: Land of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: An Egyptian king (Jack Hawkins) builds a pyramid for himself and his riches, which his wife (Joan Collins) wants. Starring Jack Hawkins, Joan Collins, Dewey Martin.

programme.title: Strange Lady in Town
programme.desc: A 19th-century doctor meets with public resistance when she tries to establish a medical practice in Santa Fe. Starring Greer Garson, Dana Andrews, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Rebellious Cal (James Dean) competes with his twin, Aron, for the love of his rigid father (Raymond Massey) and for a girl in 1917 California. Starring James Dean, Julie Harris, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Roger Corman: The Pope of Pop Cinema
programme.desc: "Roger Corman" is a by the numbers look at one of the most influential names in Hollywood; though many know him for his low budget exploitation movies, Roger Corman is also responsible for giving many names their start in the business.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: A busboy is embraced by the beatnik art community when he develops an impressive but morbid method of sculpturing. Starring Dick Miller, Barboura Morris, Antony Carbone.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that its carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it. Starring Jonathan Haze, Jackie Joseph, Mel Welles.

programme.title: Teenage Doll
programme.desc: After killing a member of a teenage gang in a fight over her boyfriend, a girl seeks the protection of his gang. Starring June Kenney, Fay Spain, John Brinkley.

programme.title: Five Guns West
programme.desc: Five criminals are recruited by the Confederacy for a dangerous mission in exchange for a pardon. The men must travel to Kansas to intercept a stagecoach that is carrying a Confederate traitor and spy. Starring John Lund, Dorothy Malone, Mike Connors.

programme.title: The Beast With a Million Eyes
programme.desc: An alien lands by spaceship and makes birds, cows and other animals attack a ranch family. Starring Paul Birch, Lorna Thayer, Dona Cole.

programme.title: The Beginning or the End
programme.desc: Gen. Leslie R. Groves (Brian Donlevy) oversees scientists on the Manhattan Project, the first atomic bomb. Starring Brian Donlevy, Robert Walker, Tom Drake.

programme.title: Luxury Liner
programme.desc: A cruise-ship captains (George Brent) daughter (Jane Powell) stows away and plays Cupid for him and a passenger (Frances Gifford). Starring George Brent, Jane Powell, Frances Gifford.

programme.title: Father Takes a Wife
programme.desc: A shipping magnate (Adolphe Menjou) and his actress wife (Gloria Swanson) meet a singing Latin stowaway (Desi Arnaz) on their rough honeymoon cruise. Starring Adolphe Menjou, Gloria Swanson, Desi Arnaz.

programme.title: Tarzans Hidden Jungle
programme.desc: The ape man (Gordon Scott) stampedes two poachers posing as cameramen with a U.N. doctor (Peter Van Eyck). Starring Gordon Scott, Vera Miles, Peter van Eyck.

programme.title: Carnival Day
programme.desc: A racing jockey needs prize money to ask the carnival florist to marry him. Starring Henry Armetta, Felix Knight, Joan Barclay.

programme.title: Godspell
programme.desc: Heeding the call of John the Baptist (David Haskell), New Yorkers flock to the side of Jesus Christ (Victor Garber) and re-enact the Gospel of Matthew through song and dance. Starring Victor Garber, David Haskell, Jerry Sroka.

programme.title: The Shoes of the Fisherman
programme.desc: A Ukrainian bishop (Anthony Quinn) and former Siberian prisoner is sent to Rome, made cardinal and elected pope. Starring Anthony Quinn, Laurence Olivier, Oskar Werner.

programme.title: Northern Pursuit
programme.desc: A Mounties (Errol Flynn) fiancee (Julie Bishop) joins him as he leads a Nazi pilot (Helmut Dantine) and spies into a trap. Starring Errol Flynn, Julie Bishop, Helmut Dantine.

programme.title: Kind Lady
programme.desc: A British con man (Maurice Evans) and his gang hold an elderly art-lover (Ethel Barrymore) prisoner in her home. Starring Ethel Barrymore, Maurice Evans, Angela Lansbury.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: To evade gangsters, two men (Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon) don skirts and makeup and join an all-girl band with a sizzling singer (Marilyn Monroe). Starring Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon, Marilyn Monroe.

programme.title: The Great Race
programme.desc: The Great Leslie (Tony Curtis) and sinister professor Fate (Jack Lemmon) enter their wacky cars in a 1908 race from New York to Paris. Starring Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon, Natalie Wood.

programme.title: T-Men
programme.desc: Two U.S. Treasury agents (Dennis OKeefe, Alfred Ryder) pose as mobsters to bust a counterfeiting ring. Starring Dennis OKeefe, Alfred Ryder, Mary Meade.

programme.title: Scandal: The Trial of Mary Astor
programme.desc: A woman has to make a difficult choice after learning her personal diaries have been stolen.

programme.title: Rumble: The Indians Who Rocked the World
programme.desc: Filmmaker Catherine Bainbridge examines the role of Native Americans in contemporary music history. She exposes a critical missing chapter, revealing how indigenous musicians helped influence popular culture.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole
programme.desc: Marc Fennell unravels the true history of the Koh-i-Noor diamond, which sits at the heart of the Crown Jewels; beyond the glitz, he reveals the tragedy of a 10-year-old Sikh boy ripped from his mother and kingdom.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole
programme.desc: Underneath Queen Elizabeth IIs coronation throne was a sacred stone that was stolen from Scottish kings; one Christmas night, a group of Glasgow students decided to steal it back.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole
programme.desc: One of Canadas proud leaders chooses between signing a deal with Queen Victoria or facing disease and devastation, and the British forces might literally steal the shirt from his back.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole
programme.desc: Scattered across Australia are fragments of a mysterious ancient mosaic found in Palestine; putting the pieces together reveals how the British Empire shaped the modern Middle East.

programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.desc: A group of surfers chase their sun-soaked dreams across Australia in 1971, but best mates Trotter and Snapper soon become bitter rivals as competing surf brands are born.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman
programme.desc: The Whitaker family returns home from a night out celebrating son Barts graduation from university when they interrupt a burglary in progress at their Texas home.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Chosen Family
programme.desc: Yoga teacher Ann cannot escape her manic family and miserable dating life. Things start looking up, however, when her friends set her up with a divorced dad who has an adorable 7-year-old daughter. Starring Heather Graham, John Brotherton, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her home, her infant son left unharmed just feet away. With no forced entry and few clues, the case goes cold for decades, until groundbreaking DNA technology leads investigators to an unexpected answer.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A Fourth of July cruise turns deadly as a passenger vanishes moments after leaving the dance floor; the details of what occurred that night continues to haunt family and friends as they search for closure.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: An owner-operator gambling cruise director is found dead in the bathroom; all signs point to murder.

programme.title: The Wandering Barber
programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better; to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn about local barbers.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldnt be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe its time to take a chance on love. Starring Golda Rosheuvel, John Hannah, Sophie Cookson.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A Fourth of July cruise turns deadly as a passenger vanishes moments after leaving the dance floor; the details of what occurred that night continues to haunt family and friends as they search for closure.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: An owner-operator gambling cruise director is found dead in the bathroom; all signs point to murder.

programme.title: The Wandering Barber
programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better; to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn about local barbers.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A single mother moves into a state-of-the-art smart house, complete with an in-home security system. However, as strange glitches and stranger events start to occur, she soon realizes that shes not the only one watching through her security cameras. Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen ODriscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When gold bullion goes missing at the airport, it triggers a media frenzy over a seemingly perfect heist; the Winnipeg weather and bad luck for the criminals alter the course of the case.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: TV news anchorwoman Marisa Burke and her seemingly perfect husband, Mark Kandel, become the eye of a media storm when Marks twisted double life starts making headlines.

programme.title: Fake
programme.desc: Birdie is excited to celebrate Antons wedding with Joe by her side; their plans fall apart when Joe urgently needs a property deposit; with their future at stake, Birdie scrambles to gather the money.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant
programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: Fake
programme.desc: Birdie is excited to celebrate Antons wedding with Joe by her side; their plans fall apart when Joe urgently needs a property deposit; with their future at stake, Birdie scrambles to gather the money.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on Thanksgiving Day, leaving behind a mystery that stuns a small Colorado town. As investigators dig into her disappearance, they uncover a chilling plot fueled by deception, betrayal, and a desperate fight for control.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant
programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: Jess is a woman on the run, desperate to cross the Canadian border to escape her past. On her tail is a resourceful agent whose life-altering diagnosis leaves her one step behind, with the stakes of her pursuit rising to apocalyptic proportions. Starring Sonya Walger, Hayley Erin, Tony Amendola.

programme.title: Snow Angel
programme.desc: After a fatal accident in a snowy village at the eastern tip of Quebec, a screwed-up ex-pro snowboarder decides to pack up her cabin and leave town for good, but someone -- or something -- seems intent on stopping her. Starring Kimberly-Sue Murray, Olivier Renaud, Catherine Berube.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Reagan Tokes, a student, disappears, prompting an investigation; her case raises questions about parole and criminal justice.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A shooting outside a local restaurant leaves Raul Cuadros dead; camera footage leads to felon David Randall Wright, a career criminal who leads interrogators down a winding path as they hope to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Rebecca calls the police when she finds her husband dead in their living room; when the police begin to suspect that the widow could be a suspect, they must find a balance between pushing for the truth and potentially accusing an innocent woman.

programme.title: Threats from the Inside
programme.desc: Brad Collins love for his wife, Amy, becomes an all-encompassing obsession, and he grows more and more controlling of her with each passing year. When Brad finds out that Amy had an affair with a colleague, a huge fight ensues and tragedy results. Starring Matt Wells, Sarah Cleveland, Scott Gibson.

programme.title: My Mother Stole My Life
programme.desc: A woman steals her estranged daughters identity to escape from an abusive boyfriend. However, when he tracks her down, she finds herself in even more danger. Starring Patrice Goodman, Blaise Crocker, JaNae Armogan.

programme.title: Daughter of the Bride
programme.desc: A daughter tries to sabotage her mothers wedding while navigating her own love life and career. Starring Marcia Gay Harden, Halston Sage, Andrew Richardson.

programme.desc: Rebecca calls the police when she finds her husband dead in their living room; when the police begin to suspect that the widow could be a suspect, they must find a balance between pushing for the truth and potentially accusing an innocent woman.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction. Starring Steve Buscemi, John Magaro, Britt Lower.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)

programme.title: Mercy (2026)

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: A linguistics professor (Amy Adams) leads an elite team of investigators in a race against time to communicate with extraterrestrial visitors.

programme.title: Afterburn (2025)
programme.desc: After a massive solar flare destroys the Eastern Hemisphere, a treasure hunter for hire ventures to Europe to retrieve the coveted Mona Lisa, only to learn that the world needs a hero more than it needs a painting.

programme.title: Species II (1998)
programme.desc: A half-alien female (Natasha Henstridge) escapes from a government compound to search for the half-alien male who has been raping and fatally impregnating women.

programme.title: Blame It on Rio (1983)
programme.desc: A middle-aged coffee broker (Michael Caine) eyes his partners (Joseph Bologna) nubile teenage daughter (Michelle Johnson) on vacation in Brazil.

programme.title: American Classic

programme.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven (1989)

programme.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven 2 (1996)
programme.desc: Charlie Barkin is finding life in dog heaven a little dull, and he longs to go back to Earth. When Charlies old nemesis, Carface, steals the horn used by the archangel Gabriel, Charlie and Itchy quickly volunteer to retrieve it.

programme.title: Lifeguard (1976)

programme.title: Hair (1979)

programme.title: Suburbicon (2017)
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as family man Gardner Lodge navigates the towns dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk (2003)
programme.desc: A martial-arts master (Chow Yun-Fat) finds an unlikely protege (Seann William Scott) to take over the responsibility of protecting an ancient scroll.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: If You Lust Me
programme.desc: A young woman puts the age-old adage of love at first sight to the test when a stranger professes his undying devotion. But is he sincere or is it just another con by some hustler trying to get her in bed? She decides to give him a test... of sorts..

programme.title: The Ledge (2011)
programme.desc: After an atheistic neighbor (Charlie Hunnam) has an affair with his wife, a vengeful Fundamentalist forces the man to choose between killing himself or allowing someone else to die in his place.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.
